MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT SILVER GLASS & MIRROR CO., MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT.
APPEARANCES: David T. Moutouz, Esq. (650) 548-0324 for plaintiff and opposing party; Angel M. Baker, Esq. (510) 587-1600 for defendant and moving party.
Ruling: ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: Deny - motion for summary judgment. Failed to shift the burden on contract claims and there is a triable issue of fact Re Construction notice and defects. Prevailing party to prepare order and comply with 437C(G) and CRC 391. (302/REQ/JT) REPORTER: BELDON YEE CSR #2647
